heading: Restrictions on public use of United States Capitol Grounds
label: 5103 Restrictions on public use of United States Capitol Grounds
text: Public travel in, and occupancy of, the United States Capitol Grounds is restricted to the roads, walks, and places prepared for that purpose.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)510340:193b., .July 31, 1946, ch. 707, § 260 Stat. 718The words “by flagging, paving, or otherwise” are omitted as unnecessary.
